title: When Thursday feels like Friday but it's only Wednesday 😢
description: The mundane is feeling extra mundane. Today's devotional on purpose in the daily grind
author: Coffee With My Father

title: I was bundled up complaining. He was shivering, smiling.
author: Coffee With My Father

title: I just didn't feel like praying (and felt guilty about it)
description: Sometimes the most honest prayer is the one that says, "I don't even want to be here right now."
author: Coffee With My Father

title: I had to let the courage of being wrong disarm the pride of ego
description: Following Christ sometimes means lowering yourself first.
author: Coffee With My Father

title: God, am I just sitting here for nothing?
description: What if this season isn't about what's next? What if it's about what God is doing right now?
author: Coffee With My Father

title: I'm exhausted from being the strong one
description: God never asked you to hold it all together. He asked you to let Him hold you.
author: Coffee With My Father

title: The Joy Of Walking With God
description: Being a Christian is not just about endurance. It is about joy.
author: Coffee With My Father

title: When Your New Year Motivation Already Ran Out
description: Real satisfaction doesn't come from perfect discipline. It comes from the Bread of Life.
author: Coffee With My Father

title: When You're Afraid Of What People Think
description: Freedom comes when God's opinion becomes louder than everyone else's.
author: Coffee With My Father

title: When Prayers Seem Unanswered
description: God's silence is not the same as His absence.
author: Coffee With My Father

title: When Saying No Feels Selfish
description: Sometimes the most faithful thing you can do is protect the yes God already gave you.
author: Coffee With My Father

title: When God Writes A Different Story Than You Imagined
description: You are not failing faith. You are growing into it.
author: Coffee With My Father

title: Stop Waiting For Monday
description: Intention is good. But action is better.
author: Coffee With My Father

title: When Everyone Else Seems Fine
description: You are not the only one carrying what feels heavy today.
author: Coffee With My Father

title: When You Decide To Trust God Before You Know The Answer
description: Trusting God ahead of time doesn't mean disappointment won't hurt. It means disappointment doesn't get the final word.
author: Coffee With My Father

title: Learning To Begin Gently
description: You do not have to rush into January to be faithful.
author: Coffee With My Father

title: Before We Step Into What's Next
description: A quiet pause between what was and what will be.
author: Coffee With My Father

title: When The Noise Finally Settles
description: Sometimes when everything slows down, our hearts finally have room to speak.
author: Coffee With My Father

title: Oh, the chaos we make of this season

title: When You Keep Falling Into The Same Patterns
description: Grace is not exhausted by repetition.

title: What If God Is More Patient With You Than You Are With Yourself
description: A gentle reminder for the ones who are trying their best.

title: When You Feel Far From God
description: Silence does not mean He left. Sometimes it just means He is closer than you think.

title: When Your Life Feels Small
description: God does some of His biggest work in places no one sees.

title: When It Feels Like One Thing After Another
description: Your obstacles are real, but so is the One who has already overcome.

title: When Your Heart Feels Full and Thin At The Same Time

title: When Interruptions Are Invitations
description: God gives new mercies long before you feel ready for them.

title: When The World Tries To Dim Your Dancing
description: Maybe it's time to stop performing for the sidelines and dance for an audience of One.

title: When You Need A Fresh Start
description: God gives new mercies long before you feel ready for them.
